subcodes.first_line: Thou didst, O my God, nurture me among those who speak not Arabic, and didst rear me in the manner of the unlettered ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انک یا الهی ربیتَنی فی الاعجمیینَ و ربیتَنی بمثلِ الامیینَ لیوم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
